notes: F002 ships the human face of the platform. Two distinct user segments arrive here (prospect who came from /v2, and casual reader who arrived from search). Per D006, all 10 strikers ship with clear retired / standby pills -- Kunigami retired, Sae disabled-by-default. IP disclaimer footer required on every user-visible surface (Legal has drafted the exact text in blue-lock-ip-notice.md).
review_criteria: Stranger-friend test survives for every one of the 10 bios
Retired / standby pills read as narrative history, not apology
Non-goals ratified (no editable notes, no comparison view, no character images)
Accessibility: colour-blind status pills + aria-labels on setup diagrams
